summary: Tokens file diverges from Tailwind/CSS variables
details: Palette + spacing in tokens.ts do not match globals.css or tailwind.config.ts, so components cannot rely on a single semantic source.
Links/buttons use #007AFF/#666666 directly, bypassing theme tokens and blocking palette swaps.

summary: Error page repeats inline hex values
details: CTA + helper text use literal hex colors and hover states outside the token pipeline.

summary: Progress bar width controlled via inline style
details: Storage meter sets width with style prop, preventing Tailwind/theming overrides or reduced-motion hooks.
Analytics template renders dynamic heights via style={{height}} instead of utility classes or CSS variables.
translateX calc is embedded in style prop so theming + RTL tokens cannot hook into it.

summary: Background overlay opacity inline without prefers-reduced-motion
details: Framer Motion hero video animates opacity via style prop and never checks useReducedMotion.

summary: MaskType applied inline with lint override
details: Component relies on style={{maskType:alpha"}} and disables lint rule instead of exposing utility class."
File is never imported in src/app yet carries bespoke theme tokens and should be migrated or removed.
Contains >15 !important rules for syntax highlighting and is not wired into app, risking conflicts if reintroduced.
App ships both Radix-based toast (src/components/ui/toast.tsx) and this bespoke container, causing inconsistent APIs.
Design-system cn duplicates src/lib/utils.ts; consumers import both today.
Monolithic page mixes layout, marketing sections, and mock data, making incremental UI migration difficult.
